_readme: Raffle data. Set 'status' to 'live' to remove the Draft badge. Set 'raffleFaqUrl' to a real URL when the Raffle FAQ page is live (currently shows a disabled 'soon' link).
headline: Loyalty, finally repaid before the parade
intro: Every month, the 401jK community gives back to the people who hold the line. No paperwork, no forty-year wait — just a clean monthly draw and a prize paid straight to your wallet. Here's the gist:
prizeDetail: Each month, one winning NFT is drawn. The prize is 15,000 $401jK tokens, paid directly into the wallet holding the winning NFT at the time of the draw.

steps.title: Hold the bag
steps.body: Get your 401jK NFT and hold it in your wallet at the time of the raffle.

steps.title: You're entered
steps.body: Every 401jK NFT is automatically entered in each month's draw. No forms, no permission slips, no asking the system nicely.

steps.title: We draw
steps.body: Starting July 2026, one winner is drawn on the first Sunday of each month. Transparent. Verifiable. No insiders.

steps.title: Winner announced
steps.body: The winner is posted publicly on X and Reddit, and the prize is sent directly to their wallet. Receipts on-chain, story in the open.
